ogTitle: Singletons Mill vs Skennars Head: Climate Safety

heading: Singletons Mill vs Skennars Head — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Singletons Mill, New South Wales and Skennars Head, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Skennars Head has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Singletons Mill (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Singletons Mill or Skennars Head safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Singletons Mill has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Skennars Head scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Singletons Mill scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Skennars Head scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Singletons Mill or Skennars Head?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Skennars Head has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
